# FULL

**Enumeration Case**

Play the entire motion content including transition effects at the start and end.

## Declaration

```swift
const PlaybackStyleLiteral FULL;
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **HINT**: Play a short section of the motion content.
- **LOOP**
- **default**

items.description: Play a short section of the motion content.
